text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru was insistent on me coming
to the shrine with her. I end up going, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O god of vitality, would you please quell your
anger so I may be entrusted with your energy?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh. It's no use. I'm still feeling the same as ever.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, I can't seem to shake off this fatigue... but I
think I know why.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've been so busy lately that I haven't paid my
dues at the shrine. I must have angered the god
of vitality! I'm sure of it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, I guess there's no way out of this. I'll add a
little more to my donation... Let's make it fifty
yen and pray one more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's still feeling tired. I should probably
reevaluate her race schedule to ensure she can
perform at her best going forward.
